title: The Rajasthan and Madhya Pradesh (Transfer of Territories) Act, 1959

Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Rajasthan and Madhya Pradesh (Transfer of Territories) Act, 1959 The Rajasthan and Madhya Pradesh (Transfer of Territories) Act, 1959 Show all section Section 1. Short title. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Transfer of territories from Rajasthan to Madhya Pradesh. Section 4. Amendment of the First Schedule to the Constitution. Section 5. Amendments of Delimitation Orders. Section 6. Provision as to sitting members. Section 7. Extension of jurisdiction of Madhya Pradesh High Court. Section 8. Appropriation of moneys for expenditure in transferred territories under existing Appropriation Acts. Section 9. Assets and liabilities. Section 10. State Financial Corporations and State Electricity Boards. Section 11. Extension of laws. Section 12. Power to construe laws. Section 13. Legal proceedings. Section 14. Transfer of pending proceedings. Section 15. Effect of provisions inconsistent with other laws. Section 16. Power to remove difficulties. Section 17. Power to make rules. Schedule 1.
